title: Short Swords
description: Makes swords shorter for better visibility !
body:
**This ressource pack makes every swords texture shorter !**

_(i) Pack made for 1.20.10 but works from 1.21.6 to 1.21.11._
_______________________________________________________________________________________________

# ✨ Features:
Simply makes every swords shorter:

![Every Swords In Hotbar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c183d63359d91c64dfe2c74eacbdc6ab1b20dba5.jpeg)

Yes, even the copper sword which most "small sword" ressource pack forget.

# 💘 Support:
Thank you for reading up to here, if you haven't yet, please give my texture pack a try !

I have also made other projects you might like on my [profile page.](https://modrinth.com/user/Polr)
